elements.description: circled 'P / 1' marker directly above the left stack -- likely a pipe/stack reference callout (possibly cross-referencing a fixture or riser number on the floor plans), no legend definition visible on this sheet
circled 'P / 2' marker directly above the middle stack, same undefined reference-point style as 'P/1'
Ø2"AVC (vent cap) at top of left stack, dashed Ø2"V line running down
Ø2"AVC (vent cap) at top of middle stack, dashed Ø2"V line running down -- mirrors the left stack

third Ø2"AVC (vent cap) at top of the far-right stack, dashed Ø2"V line running down toward the water-tank/WC-1 area on the right side of the sheet -- not paired with its own Ø4"SW soil stack the way the left/middle ones are

Ø4"SW vertical pipe on the left stack, turning horizontal (Y-branch symbol) at the +3.75 level, running down past the two lower level lines to an FCO (floor cleanout) near ground level, then continuing left as 'ต่อลงถังบำบัดน้ำเสีย' (connects down to the septic/waste-treatment tank, off-sheet, arrow only -- no septic tank symbol drawn on this sheet)
Ø4"SW vertical pipe on the middle stack, mirroring the left stack's Y-branch at +3.75 and running down to join the same bottom Ø4"SW run toward the septic/waste-treatment tank
Ø3/4"CW dash-dot vertical riser on the left stack, running from the bottom Ø3/4"CW horizontal main up past the +3.75 level
Ø3/4"CW dash-dot vertical riser on the middle stack, mirroring the left one

ถังเก็บน้ำสำเร็จรูปแสตนเลส ขนาดจุ 1 ลบ.ม. มาตรฐาน มอก.989 พร้อมขาตั้งครบชุด วางบนพื้นคอนกรีตเสริมเหล็กหนา 0.10ม. เสริมเหล็ก Ø9มม. @0.20ม. -- stainless prefab water storage tank, 1 cu.m., on its own reinforced concrete pad, with FLOAT VALVE Ø1/2" at the top inlet
Ø3/4" BY PASS branch with a valve symbol, routed around/into the booster pump line, feeding into Ø1/2"CW toward the tank
เครื่องสูบน้ำเพิ่มแรงดัน (BOOSTER PUMP, BP) ชนิดอัตโนมัติ ขนาดไม่น้อยกว่า 200 วัตต์ อัตราการสูบน้ำไม่น้อยกว่า 28 ลิตร/นาที ที่ความสูง 12 เมตร ผลิตภัณฑ์ MITSUBISHI, HITACHI, FUJIKA หรือเทียบเท่า
2x ก๊อกน้ำ (C.) symbols on the Ø3/4"CW branch line just left of the booster pump
FCO symbol at ground level on the left stack's Ø4"SW line, just before it turns to run toward the septic tank connection
WC-1 toilet fixture icon on the far right of the sheet, fed by a Ø3/4"CW line running down from the right-side vent stack area
single ก๊อกน้ำ (C.) symbol on the Ø3/4"CW branch near the water meter, right side of sheet
ชุดมาตรวัดน้ำ Ø1/2" ( ในการติดตั้งเป็นของผู้รับจ้างทั้งสิ้น ), on the Ø3/4"CW line at the far right, downstream of WC-1 and the hose-bib symbol

warnings: This sheet is notably simpler than houses #3/#4's equivalent SN-04 riser diagrams: only 2 soil/waste (SW) stacks (vs 2 there too, but paired 1:1 here) plus a 3rd vent-only stack feeding a single WC-1 fixture on the water-supply side; no septic tank or grease-trap symbol is drawn on this sheet at all -- the SW stacks terminate in a bare 'ต่อลงถังบำบัดน้ำเสีย' (connects down to septic/waste-treatment tank) arrow/label with no tank icon, unlike houses #3/#4 which drew the septic tank and its full equipment-spec text block directly on this sheet. Could mean this house's septic tank detail is captured on a different sheet (e.g. the floor plan, page52) instead -- to be cross-checked once that page is read.

Two circled 'P/1' and 'P/2' markers sit directly above the left and middle stacks with no legend or definition visible anywhere on this sheet -- transcribed as unlabeled reference points rather than guessed at (possibly pump/riser/fixture cross-reference numbers used elsewhere in the drawing set). Flagged for human review.

LEVEL LABELS: the top level is explicitly '+3.75' labeled 'ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง' (ground-floor level) -- same physically-implausible pattern seen on houses #3/#4's equivalent sheets (a floor at +3.75m is far too high to be the ground floor; more likely the upper floor, 'ชั้นบน'). The two lower level lines on this sheet carry the same 'ระดับพื้นชั้นล่าง' and 'ระดับดิน' labels but with NO numeric value printed next to either -- transcribed as null/not stated rather than inventing a number matching houses #3/#4's +0.60/+0.00 pattern; to be cross-confirmed once the floor plans (expected page52 onward) are read.

Booster pump brand list here reads 'MITSUBISHI, HITACHI, FUJIKA' (clear, standard spelling) -- consistent with house #4's floor-plan sheet spelling, not the 'FUJKCA' variant seen on house #4's own riser-diagram sheet.
grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true here -- this is a schematic vertical diagram, not on the building's structural plan grid.
